mapper.select: SELECT distinct substring(asset_mgr_no from 1 for 3) FROM xeus.asset_status_hist WHERE asset_mgr_no IS NOT NULL AND asset_mgr_no <> '' AND asset_mgr_no <> 'null'

SELECT log.year AS year, count(log.year) AS count FROM ( SELECT substring(log.recv_dat, 1, 4) AS year FROM xeus.asset_status_hist log WHERE log.asset_mgr_no IS NOT NULL ) log GROUP BY log.year ORDER BY log.year

SELECT log.month AS month, count(log.month) AS count FROM ( SELECT substring(log.recv_dat, 5, 2) AS month FROM xeus.asset_status_hist log
log.asset_mgr_no IS NOT NULL
AND log.recv_dat LIKE #{year}||'%'
) log GROUP BY log.month ORDER BY log.month

SELECT log.day AS day, count(log.day) AS count FROM ( SELECT substring(log.recv_dat, 7, 2) AS day FROM xeus.asset_status_hist log
log.asset_mgr_no IS NOT NULL
AND log.recv_dat LIKE #{year}||'%'
AND log.recv_dat LIKE '____'||#{month}||'%'
) log GROUP BY log.day ORDER BY log.day

SELECT log.year AS year, count(log.year) AS count FROM ( SELECT substring(log.recv_dat, 1, 4) AS year FROM xeus.asset_status_hist log LEFT JOIN xeus.asset_infra infra ON infra.mgr_no= log.asset_mgr_no LEFT JOIN xeus.asset_cctv cctv ON cctv.mgr_no= log.asset_mgr_no
WHERE log.asset_mgr_no IS NOT NULL
AND log.asset_mgr_no LIKE #{orgNm}||'%'
) log GROUP BY log.year ORDER BY log.year

SELECT log.month AS month, count(log.month) AS count FROM ( SELECT substring(log.recv_dat, 5, 2) AS month FROM xeus.asset_status_hist log LEFT JOIN xeus.asset_infra infra ON infra.mgr_no= log.asset_mgr_no LEFT JOIN xeus.asset_cctv cctv ON cctv.mgr_no= log.asset_mgr_no WHERE log.asset_mgr_no IS NOT NULL
AND log.recv_dat LIKE #{year}||'%'
AND log.asset_mgr_no LIKE #{orgNm}||'%'
) log GROUP BY log.month ORDER BY log.month

SELECT log.day AS day, count(log.day) AS count FROM ( SELECT substring(log.recv_dat, 7, 2) AS day FROM xeus.asset_status_hist log LEFT JOIN xeus.asset_infra infra ON infra.mgr_no= log.asset_mgr_no LEFT JOIN xeus.asset_cctv cctv ON cctv.mgr_no= log.asset_mgr_no WHERE log.asset_mgr_no IS NOT NULL
AND log.recv_dat LIKE #{year}||'%'
AND log.recv_dat LIKE '____'||#{month}||'%'
AND log.asset_mgr_no LIKE #{orgNm}||'%'
) log GROUP BY log.day ORDER BY log.day

SELECT count(log.day) AS count FROM ( SELECT substring(log.recv_dat, 7, 2) AS day FROM xeus.asset_status_hist log WHERE log.asset_mgr_no IS NOT NULL
AND log.asset_mgr_no LIKE #{orgNm}||'%'
AND log.recv_dat LIKE #{date}||'%'
) log GROUP BY log.day ORDER BY log.day
